channel.title: Hello, I'm Jae
channel.description: Recent content on Hello, I'm Jae

item.title: Hi, my name is Jae.
item.description: Hi, my name is Jae. I’m Lighting TD at ICON Creative Studio, Vancouver, Canada. I have worked on 3D Animation industry for about 4 years. I started my career as lighter and compositor and then kept moving to the technical side step by step. I like learning and digging something new. My interests are shading, rendering and cutting-edge real time related technology. For better understanding on them, I’m taking CS courses as part time student.
